  "findings": [
    "Lockout device applied without an accompanying tagout device, or tagout device applied without a lockout device, violating the dual-protection and identification requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all work in the affected zone immediately.",
    "Verify energy isolation status.",
    "Apply both a compliant lock and an fully completed identification tag to all energy isolation points before resuming any work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.147, lockout/tagout requires both the physical restraint (lock) and the informational warning (tag) to be applied together by the authorized employee to ensure positive control and clear communication. Having one without the other is a critical safety violation that can lead to accidental re-energization.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(6)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(4)"
  ]
}
